text:
NAME: CLM_SS_OUTLIER_STD_PYMT_AMT 
LONG NAME: CLM_SS_OUTLIER_STD_PYMT_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
XXXXXX 
COMMENT: 
This amount does not include any applicable outlier payment amount. 
This field is derived by accumulating the amount field (CLM_SSO_STD_PMT_AMT) that is on any of the 
claim records included in the stay (i.e., sum of the CLM_SSO_STD_PMT_AMT reported on the claims that 
comprised the stay). 
This field is new in 2015. 
^ Back to TOC ^
